skill.name: backend-trpc
skill.author: andrey-belen
skill.description: Type-safe API layer for TypeScript full-stack applications. Use when building APIs that need end-to-end type safety between client and server WITHOUT code generation. Ideal for Next.js, React, and Express apps where both frontend and backend are TypeScript. Choose tRPC over REST/GraphQL when you control both ends and want zero runtime overhead for type checking.
